languages.text: {n}Силы покидают полковника и он тяжко опускается на колено. Что бы ни заставляло его держаться, оно все еще не дает старому зверю упасть, но сил сражаться дальше у него уже нет...{/n}
{n}The colonel's strength fails him and he drops heavily to his knee. Whatever force drives him, it still keeps the old beast from falling, but he has no strength left to continue the fight...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Силы покидают полковника и он тяжко опускается на колено. Что бы ни заставляло его держаться, оно все еще не дает старому зверю упасть, но сил сражаться дальше у него уже нет...{/n}

languages.text: {n}上校终于支撑不住，重重地单膝跪地。那股驱使着他的力量依旧支撑着这头年迈的野兽，使其坚持着没有倒下，但他已然没有力气继续战斗了……{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's strength fails him and he drops heavily to his knee. Whatever force drives him, it still keeps the old beast from falling, but he has no strength left to continue the fight...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}上校终于支撑不住，重重地单膝跪地。那股驱使着他的力量依旧支撑着这头年迈的野兽，使其坚持着没有倒下，但他已然没有力气继续战斗了……{/n}

languages.text: {n}Albay'ın gücü tükeniyor ve ağır bir şekilde dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor. Onu her ne itiyorsa hâlâ ihtiyarı düşmekten alıkoyuyor ama dövüşe devam edecek gücü de kalmamış...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's strength fails him and he drops heavily to his knee. Whatever force drives him, it still keeps the old beast from falling, but he has no strength left to continue the fight...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay'ın gücü tükeniyor ve ağır bir şekilde dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor. Onu her ne itiyorsa hâlâ ihtiyarı düşmekten alıkoyuyor ama dövüşe devam edecek gücü de kalmamış...{/n}

languages.text: {n}Incapable de garder sa contenance, il pose un genou à terre. Sa résilience est tout bonnement hors du commun, mais il n'a plus la force de continuer à se battre...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's strength fails him and he drops heavily to his knee. Whatever force drives him, it still keeps the old beast from falling, but he has no strength left to continue the fight...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Incapable de garder sa contenance, il pose un genou à terre. Sa résilience est tout bonnement hors du commun, mais il n'a plus la force de continuer à se battre...{/n}

languages.text: {n}Al coronel le fallan las fuerzas y cae con pesadez sobre una rodilla. La fuerza que le impulsa evita que la vieja bestia se desplome, pero no le queda energía para continuar la batalla...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's strength fails him and he drops heavily to his knee. Whatever force drives him, it still keeps the old beast from falling, but he has no strength left to continue the fight...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Al coronel le fallan las fuerzas y cae con pesadez sobre una rodilla. La fuerza que le impulsa evita que la vieja bestia se desplome, pero no le queda energía para continuar la batalla...{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alle Stärke weicht aus dem Colonel und er sinkt schwer auf sein Knie. Was auch immer ihn antreibt, verhindert, dass der alte Mann fällt, aber er hat keine Kraft mehr, den Kampf fortzusetzen ...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's strength fails him and he drops heavily to his knee. Whatever force drives him, it still keeps the old beast from falling, but he has no strength left to continue the fight...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alle Stärke weicht aus dem Colonel und er sinkt schwer auf sein Knie. Was auch immer ihn antreibt, verhindert, dass der alte Mann fällt, aber er hat keine Kraft mehr, den Kampf fortzusetzen ...{/n}

languages.text: {n}大佐の力は尽き、膝に崩れ落ちた。彼を駆り立てる力は、まだこの老獣を倒さない。しかし、大佐は戦いを続ける力はない...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel's strength fails him and he drops heavily to his knee. Whatever force drives him, it still keeps the old beast from falling, but he has no strength left to continue the fight...{/n}
